description: Ajouter une étape Interventions dans les flux de création d'immeuble et de lot, avec templates d'interventions techniques récurrentes, dates dynamiques basées sur l'échéance des documents, et assignation de contacts. Réutilise InterventionScheduleRow et ContactSelector existants.

userStories.title: Créer les templates d'interventions immeuble/lot
userStories.description: As a developer, I want property intervention templates (property-interventions.ts) so that the UI can display recommended interventions with scheduling options for buildings and lots
acceptanceCriteria: PropertyInterventionTemplate type defined with document link and dynamic date support
BUILDING_INTERVENTION_TEMPLATES has 6 templates (chaudière, ascenseur, incendie, PEB, nettoyage, espaces verts)
LOT_INTERVENTION_TEMPLATES has 2 templates (chaudière, PEB)
LOT_IN_BUILDING_INTERVENTION_TEMPLATES is empty (only missing docs generate interventions)
createMissingPropertyDocumentIntervention() generates interventions for missing documents
generatePropertyInterventions() accepts entity type, creation date, document expiry dates, and missing documents
Each template has schedulingOptions with document-expiry-based options when applicable
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Created lib/constants/property-interventions.ts — 6 building templates, 2 lot templates, empty lot_in_building. Dynamic expiry-based scheduling options. Missing doc generator.

userStories.title: Créer le composant PropertyInterventionsStep générique
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want an interventions step in the building/lot creation wizard so I can plan technical follow-ups when creating a property
acceptanceCriteria: PropertyInterventionsStep component accepts entityType ('building' | 'lot' | 'lot_in_building'), teamId, availableContacts, missingDocuments, documentExpiryDates
Renders standard interventions and missing document interventions (separated by Separator)
Toggle, date change, scheduling option change, and contact assignment work (same as LeaseInterventionsStep)
Uses InterventionScheduleRow (no modifications needed)
Uses ContactSelector with hideUI pattern for assignments
Header adapts title based on entity type
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Created components/property-interventions-step.tsx — reuses InterventionScheduleRow + ContactSelector hideUI pattern. Handles toggle/date/scheduling/assignment.

userStories.title: Intégrer l'étape Interventions dans la création d'immeuble
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the building creation wizard to include an Interventions step after Contacts & Documents so I can plan maintenance when creating a building
acceptanceCriteria: buildingSteps updated to 5 steps: Info → Lots → Contacts & Docs → Interventions → Confirmation
Step 4 renders PropertyInterventionsStep with entityType='building'
Document expiry dates from buildingDocUpload are passed to the interventions step
Missing recommended building documents generate 'Récupérer' interventions
Confirmation step (now step 5) still works correctly
Navigation (next/back) works for all 5 steps
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Integrated into building-creation-form.tsx: step 4 = interventions, step 5 = confirmation. Passes missingRecommendedTypes + expiry dates.

userStories.title: Créer les interventions en DB à la soumission (immeuble)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want enabled interventions to be created in the database when I submit the building creation form
acceptanceCriteria: After building + lots created, enabled interventions with dates are created via createInterventionAction
Building-level interventions use the building's first lot's ID (or building_id if supported)
Per-lot interventions (missing docs) use the corresponding lot_id
Assignments are passed to createInterventionAction
Failed intervention creation doesn't block building creation (Promise.allSettled)
Success/failure counts are logged
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added intervention creation to building handleFinish via Promise.allSettled + useServiceRole.

userStories.title: Intégrer l'étape Interventions dans la création de lot
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the lot creation wizard to include an Interventions step so I can plan maintenance when creating a standalone lot
acceptanceCriteria: lotSteps updated to 5 steps: Immeuble → Lot → Contacts & Docs → Interventions → Confirmation
Step 4 renders PropertyInterventionsStep with correct entityType (lot or lot_in_building)
Document expiry dates from lot doc upload are passed
Missing recommended lot documents generate 'Récupérer' interventions
Interventions created in DB on submission (same pattern as US-004)
Navigation works for all 5 steps
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Integrated into lot creation page.tsx: 3 creation modes all create interventions. entityType adapts to lot vs lot_in_building. createInterventionsForLot helper avoids duplication.
